card_data.effect_text: Your opponent may either reduce your speed by 1 or choose a new command on your top command dial. Then flip this card facedown.
card_data.title: Comm Noise

damage_cards.effect_text: When you change your speed by 1 or more, suffer 1 damage.
damage_cards.title: Thruster Fissure

damage_cards.effect_text: While attacking, you cannot spend accuracy icons.
damage_cards.title: Blinded Gunners
